task.objective: Converge PR #10 assurance evidence and test architecture after independent review found correlated reference-oracle risk, incomplete verify no-mutation evidence, incomplete candidate-classification lineage reference assertions, and near-duplicate permutation case inflation, without changing Phase 1 product semantics or widening scope.

forbidden: network access from kernel tests or production code

requirements: Treat this as an autonomous assurance convergence task. Continue through diagnosis, test architecture changes, evidence correction, in-scope remediation, retries, and full verification until BUILDER_READY_FOR_REVIEW or a true stop condition is reached.

Preserve the KERNEL-ASSURE-001 deterministic kernel scope and existing authoritative semantics. Do not widen Phase 1 behavior or change contracts, terminology, Trust, Verdict semantics, protocol authority, or Evidence authority classes.

Replace or restructure the test-only Verdict reference oracle so its precedence decision is independently derived from the authoritative precedence rule and is not a structural mirror of packages/kernel/src/verdict-reduction.js. The oracle must not import or call reduceVerdictCandidates, VERDICT_PRECEDENCE, or production rank helpers; it must not derive precedence from the same ordered-array plus rank-map reduction structure used by production. Correlated implementation defects must be able to disagree with the oracle.

Continue cross-checking every non-empty combination of the four canonical Verdict values within the bounded campaign and independently verify winning Verdict, deterministic candidate ordering, reason retention, lineage retention, and published precedence output.

Add direct caller-input non-mutation evidence to the assurance campaign using a representative multi-requirement input: snapshot caller-owned input before evaluateKernel, evaluate, and prove the caller input remains deeply equal and unfrozen afterward. Keep post-evaluation mutation isolation coverage as a separate invariant.

Strengthen Evidence Lineage assurance so VERDICT_CANDIDATE_CLASSIFIED references are checked with concrete expected reference fields and values, not only kind presence. Cover representative candidate classification references for at least ADMISSIBLE and one non-ADMISSIBLE path while preserving the required Claim, selected Evidence Contract, selection provenance, Evidence Requirement, accepted Observation, produced Evidence, Rule, and Verdict reduction reference checks.

Audit the 16 current permutation variants for near-duplicate cases that add no new path, invariant, or meaningful value-boundary coverage. Either diversify cases so each retained case contributes a distinct reviewable dimension or remove/collapse redundant variants. Recalculate and record the actual useful deterministic case count and family counts after the audit. At least 256 useful stable identified assurance cases must remain without relying on duplicate inflation.

Correct validation evidence that states 17 Rule matrix subcases failed when the generated Rule matrix contains 16 identified cases. Distinguish identified subcase failures from any enclosing parent test failure if supported by retained evidence; otherwise record the limitation precisely and do not invent an exact breakdown.

Produce deterministic pnpm verify no-mutation evidence using a pre/post comparison of the tracked diff state and the sorted untracked/status state around the observed verify run. Record the exact comparison method, exact pre/post values, exit status, and whether any tracked or untracked repository artifact changed. A qualitative observation alone is insufficient.

Perform the no-mutation comparison after the convergence implementation and documentation set is otherwise complete. It may be recorded afterward in validation evidence, but the record must clearly state that sequencing and must not overclaim exact-head execution if the evidence append occurred after the measured verify run.

Re-audit the assurance campaign for vacuous tests, skipped/todo/only tests, no-throw-only assertions, false-positive pass conditions, and duplicated identified cases that add no new path or invariant. Record the audit result and any removed or diversified case identities.

If strengthened assurance discovers a packages/kernel defect that violates existing authoritative semantics, autonomously diagnose and remediate it within writable scope, add a focused regression, and rerun the full campaign. Do not weaken or delete a failing assurance case to preserve a Builder claim.

Update docs/engineering/kernel-assurance-campaign.md, docs/engineering/validation-evidence.md, and the Builder review with exact post-convergence architecture, case counts, findings, dispositions, command results, no-mutation evidence, and known gaps.

Record every new Builder-discovered finding with ID, severity CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW, source, affected path, observation, risk, remediation, validation, and disposition FIXED/OPEN/DEFERRED_WITH_REASON/BLOCKED.
Do not claim Phase 1 completion, product readiness, independent acceptance, PASS, PASS_FOR_INTEGRATION, or ADMISSIBLE as Builder task status.

requiredInvariants: The Verdict reference oracle is test-only and structurally independent enough to detect a correlated production precedence implementation defect.
All non-empty canonical Verdict combinations in the bounded reference campaign match the independent oracle.
At least 256 useful stable identified assurance cases remain after duplicate-case audit.
Case identity and generation order remain deterministic and reviewable.
Semantically equivalent normalized inputs produce deeply equal bundles and stable bundle identities.
Caller input remains deeply equal to its pre-evaluation snapshot and remains unfrozen after evaluation.
Post-evaluation caller mutation cannot alter finalized bundle content or identity.
Representative VERDICT_CANDIDATE_CLASSIFIED lineage entries expose the expected concrete references.
Verdict reduction preserves all applicable reason codes and candidate lineage references in deterministic order.
The campaign contains no skipped/todo/only tests, no no-throw-only assertions, and no duplicate case inflation used to satisfy the 256-case threshold.
pnpm verify remains non-mutating under the recorded deterministic pre/post comparison.
No production package outside contracts and kernel exists.
No repository inspection, target-code execution, verification execution, Policy runtime, adapter, delivery, network, or inference path is introduced.

requiredArtifacts: structurally independent test-only Verdict reference oracle
duplicate-case audit with recalculated useful campaign counts
deterministic pnpm verify no-mutation comparison evidence
stopConditions: a new external dependency is required
a new production package is required
repository inspection product behavior is required
verification execution product behavior is required
adapter or Adapter Capability implementation is required
delivery or integration surface work is required
repeated autonomous remediation reaches a deadlock without converging
